RETURN.description: one of @link Side#PLUS Side.PLUS}, @link Side#MINUS Side.MINUS}, @link Side#BOTH Side.BOTH} or @link Side#HYPER Side.HYPER (the latter result can occur only if the tree contains only one cut hyperplane)
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == (args[0] == Side.PLUS || args[0] == Side.MINUS || args[0] == Side.BOTH || receiverObjectID.containsOnlyOneCutHyperplane());
RETURN.content: one of @link Side#PLUS Side.PLUS}, @link Side#MINUS Side.MINUS}, @link Side#BOTH Side.BOTH} or @link Side#HYPER Side.HYPER (the latter result can occur only if the tree contains only one cut hyperplane)

RETURN.description: Get the parts of a sub-hyperplane that are contained in the region.
